event.name: Formula 1 Lenovo Grand Prix du Canada 2026

gaps.note: Pit-stop counts from f1db's pit-stop data era (1994+); earlier races have no per-stop records.
Open-Meteo hourly reanalysis joined by venue coordinates; model estimate at the venue, not track-side sensor data.
No keyless personnel-status feed exists for F1; driver substitutions surface only post-hoc in results.

Prediction markets (Polymarket) 2024-present only; no keyless bookmaker odds history for F1. Public per owner decision 2026-07-19 (OQ #6 closed: rights unlocated, not denied); excluded from commercial delivery.
Fastest race lap from f1db (stepped horizon: timing precision improves by era). Speed-trap and telemetry measurements have no license-clean source (SR G7).
